name: nodejs_workout
description: Node.js practice covering all core modules and topics

scripts._note_2: Start API server and run client in parallel (background)
scripts._note_3: Lint must pass before build starts
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run compile
scripts._note_4: If tests fail, show an error message
scripts._note_5: Run cleanup then log message no matter what
scripts._note_6: Run multiple scripts sequentially (one after another)
scripts._note_8: Run all scripts starting with 'dev:' in parallel
scripts._note_9: Run server and client concurrently with colored logs

author: Muhammed YILDIRIM
